next_steps: Measure thyroid function tests including TSH, free T4, and T3
Perform thyroid ultrasound with Doppler to assess for blood flow and nodularity
Monitor inflammatory markers (CRP and ESR) as they correlate with disease activity
Consider fine-needle aspiration of the thyroid nodule if ultrasound suggests suspicious features
Consider empiric treatment with non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs if subacute thyroiditis is confirmed
Measure serum TSH, free T4, T3, and serum thyroglobulin
Perform thyroid ultrasound with color Doppler flow imaging
Measure serum ferritin to screen for adult-onset Still's disease and HLH
Consider 18F-FDG PET/CT if biochemical and ultrasound evaluation do not yield a diagnosis
